chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Reward of Visiting the Prophet {saws} and the Imams {a.s}, Peace Be Upon Them All

text: 3162 - وَ رَوَى جَابِرٌ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «مِنْ تَمَامِ اَلْحَجِّ لِقَاءُ اَلْإِمَامِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3162 - Jabir narrated from Abu Ja’far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) who said:
"Part of the completeness of Hajj is meeting the Imam."
